procdef.label: Procs / Functions stat card — click to jump directly to the procedures list
Procs / Functions tab — the procedure list and search box live here
Content area — search by name, then click any row to expand and see the full T-SQL definition

viewdef.label: Views stat card — click to jump directly to the views list
Views tab — contains the searchable list of all views
Content area — search for the view name, then click the row to expand it
Detail panel — click Show / Hide Definition for the T-SQL, and see the plain-English explanation below it

tabledef.label: Tables stat card — click to jump to the tables list
Schema sidebar — type a table name here to narrow the list instantly
Content area — click a table to open its detail panel with columns, types, DDL, and row count

colsearch.label: Columns tab — search all columns across every schema at once
Column search box — type any partial column name or data type
Results — shows every table that contains a matching column, with schema and data type

schemas.label: Schemas stat card — click to see all schemas in this environment
Schema sidebar — click any schema name to filter the entire report to that schema
Schema cards — each card shows table / view / proc counts; click to expand
